title: Amendment to interim reports 2021
full_text:
Klarna hereby announces a minor correction of its interim reports 2021, which were published on August 25, 2021.

On page 3 of the reports, the phrase Net Operating Income was incorrectly translated as ‘rörelseresultat’ instead of ‘rörelseintäkter’. The correct translation is used in both the Business Overview and statutory financial statements. The reported figures for Net Operating Income remain unchanged. Corrected versions of the interim reports are attached to this press release and also available on <www.klarna.com>.

For additional information, please email press@klarna.com
